name: Israel Acquisitions Corp
business: Israel Acquisitions Corp is a blank check company incorporated to effect a merger or similar combination with one or more businesses, focusing on Israeli high-growth technology companies. It has generated no revenues to date. Its proposed business combination target is Gadfin Ltd., a company specializing in hydrogen-powered drones for logistics and cargo delivery.

exposures.sentence: Gadfin is a pioneering technology company revolutionizing the logistics and cargo delivery industry with its innovative hydrogen-powered drones.
Specializing in long-range, heavy-duty, zero-emission aerial delivery, Gadfin provides cutting-edge solutions for time-critical, essential cargo transport, especially to less accessible areas.

Gadfin s proprietary technology is designed to address the evolving needs of sectors such as healthcare, logistics, and industrial supply chains, enabling efficient, sustainable, and reliable deliveries across urban and remote areas.

catalysts.event: Termination date for the Business Combination Agreement if transactions not consummated
catalysts.sentence: Pursuant to the Third Amendment, the Company and Gadfin agreed to revise Section 7.1(d) to extend the termination date to April 15, 2026.
